objective: Sweep Extension Reversal candidates on 1h markets — fade compounded synth+last-closed extensions.
outcomeSource: Pyth spot 1h candle direction. This does not include Polymarket market prices or odds.
decisionTiming: For each 1h target candle, decide 15 minutes before the target candle opens using a synthetic of the prior (in-progress) hour built from 1m Pyth candles through `target.open - 15min`. The filter never sees any data from the target candle itself.
